case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. FELICIA REDUS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REDUS, FELICIA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-23-2009

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REDUS, FELICIA $5,432.46 PRINCIPAL, $2,929.06 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,597.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
